allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for name, info in data.get\('named_endpoints', {}\).items\(\): print\(f'=== {name} ==='\) for i, p in enumerate\(info.get\('parameters', []\)\): print\(f' [{i}] {p.get\(\\"parameter_name\\",\\"?\\"\)} : {p.get\(\\"python_type\\",{}\).get\(\\"type\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) print\(\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) ep = data.get\('named_endpoints', {}\) for name, info in ep.items\(\): params = info.get\('parameters', []\) returns = info.get\('returns', []\) print\(f'{name}: {len\(params\)} params, {len\(returns\)} returns'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) deps = data.get\('dependencies', []\) print\(f'Total deps: {len\(deps\)}'\) for i, d in enumerate\(deps[:20]\): api = d.get\('api_name'\) or d.get\('id'\) or '?' trig = d.get\('trigger', '?'\) print\(f' [{i}] api_name={api} trigger={trig}'\) ")
